testcase.name: pretragaKlijenata_Uspesno_PostojeciEmail
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select k1_0.id,k1_0.brojTelefona,k1_0.email,k1_0.idMesto,k1_0.ime,k1_0.prezime,k1_0.starost from klijent k1_0 where k1_0.email like replace(?,'\\','\\\\') Hibernate: select m1_0.id,m1_0.nazivMesta,m1_0.opstina from mesto m1_0 where m1_0.id=?

STVARNI ODGOVOR SA BEKA: [{"id":1,"ime":"Milan","prezime":"Jovanovic","starost":35,"brojTelefona":"0611234567","email":"milan@gmail.com","mesto":{"id":2,"nazivMesta":"Novi Sad","opstina":"Novi Sad"}},{"id":2,"ime":"Ana","prezime":"Nikolic","starost":28,"brojTelefona":"0621234567","email":"ana@gmail.com","mesto":{"id":1,"nazivMesta":"Beograd","opstina":"Vracar"}},{"id":3,"ime":"Stefan","prezime":"Petrovic","starost":40,"brojTelefona":"0631234567","email":"stefan@gmail.com","mesto":{"id":3,"nazivMesta":"Nis","opstina":"Medijana"}},{"id":10,"ime":"Novi","prezime":"Klijent","starost":25,"brojTelefona":"0699999999","email":"novi@gmail.com","mesto":{"id":1,"nazivMesta":"Beograd","opstina":"Vracar"}}]

testcase.name: addKlijent_Uspesno
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select k1_0.id from klijent k1_0 where k1_0.email=? limit ? Hibernate: select m1_0.id,m1_0.nazivMesta,m1_0.opstina from mesto m1_0 where m1_0.id=? Hibernate: select k1_0.id,k1_0.brojTelefona,k1_0.email,im1_0.id,im1_0.nazivMesta,im1_0.opstina,k1_0.ime,k1_0.prezime,k1_0.starost from klijent k1_0 left join mesto im1_0 on im1_0.id=k1_0.idMesto where k1_0.id=?
